About the firm

A Dubai practice,
built on MEP.

"Efficient, economical, and code-compliant — that's the brief on every drawing we sign."

Green Concept Engineering Consultants opened its Dubai office in June 2012 to close a gap the market kept running into: building services design that holds up under UAE authority review from day one. Since then, the practice has delivered design and site supervision for residential towers, hospitality, healthcare, laboratory and industrial facilities across the Emirates and the wider Gulf — to international codes and Dubai Municipality Green Building Regulations, LEED and Estidama alike.

  • ISO 9001:2015 certified practice
  • LEED & Estidama aligned design
  • In-house HV/MV substation design
  • Approved by Dubai Municipality & EMAAR
Meet the leadership
Vision & mission

What we're building toward.

Our vision

Green buildings, as standard.

To play an important role in implementing green building concepts in the MEP design of every building we touch — for more efficient buildings and a greener environment.

Our mission

Consistent, on time, every time.

To be consistent in satisfying our clients through the quality of our MEP services design, and in meeting every project's target dates.

Certification & standards

Designed against the rulebook.

ISO 9001:2015Quality Mgmt.
LEEDCompliant Design
EstidamaPearl Rated
DM Regs.Green Building
Civil DefenceLife Safety
Scope of work

Three disciplines, one drawing set.

From substation to sensor, our engineers carry every system through design, authority approval and site supervision under a single roof.

Mechanical & Plumbing

HVAC and plumbing systems designed for load, code and comfort — sized correctly the first time, supervised to stay that way on site.

Full scope of service
  • HVAC systems (heating, ventilation & air conditioning)
  • Smoke management systems
  • Cold & hot water distribution systems
  • Foul & storm water drainage systems
  • Fire protection & suppression systems
  • Building & room management systems
  • LPG & natural gas distribution systems
  • Sewage treatment & grey water recycling plants
  • Potable water treatment plants
  • Medical & lab gases distribution systems
  • Compressed air systems
  • Renewable energy systems (solar, wind, geothermal)
Enquire about this service

Electrical

Power distribution engineered from the substation down to the last outlet, including high and medium voltage infrastructure.

Full scope of service
  • High & medium voltage substations
  • HV, MV & LV distribution networks
  • Emergency / standby power generation & distribution
  • Uninterrupted power supply (UPS) systems
  • Lighting & control systems
  • Earthing & lightning protection systems
  • Fire alarm, detection & early-warning systems
  • Telephone & data communication systems
  • Electronic security & video surveillance systems
  • Data centers
  • Intelligent building management & home automation
  • Vertical transportation (lifts, escalators, conveyors)
Enquire about this service

Security Consultancy

Access control, surveillance and life-safety systems specified alongside MEP, not bolted on after the fact.

Full scope of service
  • Security risk assessment studies & reporting
  • Physical & electronic security system design
  • Conceptual & detailed security system design
  • Specification compilation & itemized BOQ
  • Specialized site supervision for security systems
  • Code consultancy
  • Survey of existing & planned protection provisions
  • Drawing review & attestation per SIRA (Law 12/2016)
Enquire about this service

Leadership

Who signs the drawing.

Amjad Nassar

Managing Director

30+ years in MEP consultancy. Owns and manages the firm's design and delivery process end to end.

Peer Mohamed

Head of Electrical

Leads HV/MV substation and power distribution design across the firm's live engagements.

Mohammed Amin Alchi

Head of Mechanical

Runs HVAC and plumbing system design, from load calculation through site supervision.

RK

Rejaneesh K. P.

Head of ELV Engineers

Leads fire alarm, data, security and extra-low-voltage system design across live engagements.

Latest news

Milestones worth noting.

Company UpdateSecurity Consultancy

We are pleased to announce that Green CEC has obtained approval from SIRA (Security Industry Regulatory Agency) as a licensed Security Consultant — another milestone in our expertise across MEP, ELV and security systems consultancy.

SIRA Approved Consultant
Careers

Build the systems
Dubai runs on.

We're a small, senior practice — every hire works directly on live MEP design and site supervision from day one, alongside engineers with 25–30 years in the field.

  • Direct exposure to landmark Dubai & GCC projects
  • Mentorship from ISO 9001-certified leadership
  • Work across mechanical, electrical & ELV disciplines
